title: Ability to automate boards within a workspace

posts.author: carlylaine (Carly )
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to use an automation where the trigger is “when a new board is created” (in a specific folder), connect to another board.
We have a workspace where a detailed project board template is generated when a deal is marked as sold. It would be extremely handy if the project board could be linked to the customer contact for said project. The ability to automate different things from the workspace instead of just within a board, would be extremely useful.
